description: The ABCs of God’s Promises A Bible Verse Alphabet Book for Little Ones Journey from A to Z and experience God’s wonderful promises through 26 Bible verses that are thoughtful, encouraging and powerful. A delightful picture book that introduces young children to the Scriptures in a fun and engaging way . Definitely a great tool to spark conversation with your little ones about God’s love and grace! Great for preschoolers, the fun and colorful illustrations will capture your child’s attention, while the Bible verses will speak to their hearts, helping them to grow in their faith. God’s word will be a source of strength and comfort throughout their lives! This ABC book is perfect for: Home schooling Sunday school Scripture memorization Evangelism tool Baptism gift Baby dedication gift This book definitely makes a great gift idea for those who are raising little believers!
